Notes*: Critical condition determined by monitoring retention volumes of PEG standards
Source text: The critical condition for the analysis of diblock copolymer was a 68 °C column temperature and an ACN/water mixture at the ratio of 60/40 (v/ v).

Polymer system*: PEO-b-PLLA diblock copolymer and PLLA-b-PEO-b-PLLA triblock copolymer
Notes*: Critical condition for PEO block; longer PLLA block analysis required higher ACN content and temperature
Source text: For the analysis of the longer PLLA blocks, the critical condition was changed again by increasing the content of ACN (ACN:H 2 O ) 54:46, v/v) and raising the temperature (54 °C)
